## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's coding style
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) with appropriate scope
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Skin validation passes (if skin changes: `pnpm validate:skins`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
